title: Airframes Custom-Tune 910.525 MHz Filter

test_results.notes: This unit was re-tuned by the Austin Mesh community from the Meshtastic default frequency to the MeshCore frequency. We were able to achieve 1.8db loss.

description: Bandpass cavity filter with ~8.5MHz passband with SMA input/output
commentary: The airframes was the first robust cavity filter to the mesh market, so it gained a lot of popularity. They're fine filters, but the lead times tend to be long and they're rarely in stock. Tuning them isn't hard if you know how to use a VNA, but it's also not _easy_. The unit we tested here was re-tuned by the Austin Mesh community for the Default MeshCore US frequency.
